\u0930\u0947\u0936\u094d\u092e\u093e \u0: Reshma and Kumar are mysteriously haunted by their past lives. When they finally meet, they fall in love with each other, but their father attempts to separate them.
\u092c\u091a\u092a\u0928 \u0915\u0947 \u: Childhood friends Ram and Avtaar become embroiled in a love triangle when both fall for Sangeeta. Ram sacrifices his love for Avtaar, but his enemy Gundappa Swami threatens to reveal the truth.
\u0915\u094c\u0928 \u0938\u091a\u094d\u0: who is true and who is liar
\u090f\u0915 \u092a\u0941\u0932\u093f\u0: Karan, a policeman, goes undercover to get treatment from Dr. Sapna, a psychiatrist, and investigate the murder for which the doctor has been accused.
\u090f\u0915 \u0906\u0926\u092e\u0940 \u: After crushing a man under a car, Abhay is released and falls in love with his psychopathic daughter. However, on seeing Sonal with Abhay, Sonal's brother accuses Abhay of rape.
\u0905\u0928\u093f\u0932 \u0915\u0940 \u: Anil's mother is falsely accused of theft and sent to jail. Years later, he becomes a famous artist and returns his mother's lost respect. But his fame makes many enemies for him.
\u092a\u094d\u0930\u0915\u093e\u0936, \u: Prakash hatches a plan to extort money from his unbelieving father-in-law. He is joined by Rahul and Harry, who are in dire need of money and help him kidnap his wife as part of the plan.
\u0928\u091c\u092e\u093e, \u0938\u0932\u: Najma loves Salim, but cannot marry until she is financially stable. When a rich old man, Shakir, proposes to marry her, she gets him married to Shabnam, who is in love with Sarju.
\u090f\u0915 \u092f\u0941\u0935\u0915 \u: A young man unexpectedly meets a mysterious woman, whom he suspects of being a ghost. However, his worst fears come true when his mother arranges his marriage to the same woman.
\u090f\u0915 \u0932\u093e\u0932\u091a\u0: A greedy son throws his elderly parents out of the house. Years later, his son decides to teach him a lesson and throws him out of the house.
\u0938\u0941\u0932\u094d\u0924\u093e\u09: Sultan raises an orphan, Babu, who grows up to be a criminal named Badshah. He changes his ways when he falls in love with Sapna, but Sultan tries to remind him of his past.
\u0926\u094b\u0938\u094d\u0924, \u0936\u: Friends, Shankar and Shambhu have a lot in common and are in love with the same girl. When the girl falls in love with Shankar, Shambhu breaks his friendship with him and joins the opposition.
\u0935\u093f\u091c\u092f \u0905\u092a\u0: Vijay grows up dreaming of solving his village's water problem. He decides to participate in a Kabaddi competition to attract the attention of the bureaucracy.
When Kalpana's parents believe her lies: When Kalpana's parents believe her lies about her husband Rajesh's newfound success and decide to visit her after she delivers a baby, Kalpana finds herself in a predicament.
\u0926\u0941\u0930\u094d\u0917\u093e \u0: Durga is an ordinary village girl whose family is brutally murdered by Thakur. She picks up a gun and chooses a criminal lifestyle to avenge the death of her family.
Believing his wife to be dead, Anand giv: Believing his wife to be dead, Anand gives up his own child to Yashoda, who has lost her husband and her baby. However, he faces a dilemma when his wife returns.
\u092c\u093e\u0926\u0936\u093e\u0939 \u0: Badshah Khan travels to India to find the murderer of Benazir's father so he can impress her. He succeeds but soon finds himself in an Indian prison accused of a murder.
\u092e\u0927\u0941\u0915\u0930 \u0914\u0: Madhukar and Jaggu set out to rule and oppress the people of a village by depriving them of education. Ramu, however, receives education secretly with the help of a school teacher.
\u092a\u094d\u0930\u0915\u093e\u0936 \u0: Prakash has to take care of the responsibilities of the entire family after the sudden death of his father. Her younger brother Chandan constantly tries to ruin her married life.
\u0936\u094d\u092f\u093e\u092e \u0905\u0: Shyam comes to India to fulfill the last wish of his late mother who wanted him to marry an Indian girl. Unknowingly he falls in love with a girl who has become a pawn in the hands of his enemies.
\u0905\u0927\u093f\u0915\u093e\u0930\u09: Officer Kapil takes the help of underworld man, Azam, to get evidence against the crook, D'Costa. When Azam is killed, his son, Akbar, holds Kapil responsible and takes revenge.
A rich girl runs away from home and sett: A rich girl runs away from home and settles down with a truck driver. However, her dream life is shattered when she learns that her new lover has been accused of murder.
\u090f\u0915 \u091a\u094b\u0930, \u091f\: A thief, Tony is always under the radar of the police, whether he commits a crime or not. Things change when Tony gets the opportunity to help the police catch a criminal.
\u0926\u0940\u0935\u093e\u0930 - \u0932\: Deewaar - Let's Bring Our Heroes Home
\u092d\u093e\u0930\u0924\u0940\u092f \u0: A group of Indian soldiers are captured during the Indo-Pak war. Gaurav's father, Major Ranveer, has been taken captive by the enemies and decides to go on a rescue mission.
\u092a\u094d\u0930\u0947\u092e \u092e\u0: Prem Mehra loses all his wealth when his rival Dharamdas, along with Prem's employee, steals his diamonds. Now Prem's sons will have to compensate for this loss to the family.
\u092a\u0941\u0932\u093f\u0938 \u0938\u0: After escaping from the police, a criminal named Pehalwan pretends to be a Baba. Soon, under the guise of this, he gathers many devotees and also carries out illegal activities.
Jai's father asks him to meet Sunita bef: Jai's father asks him to meet Sunita before getting married to her. However, complications arise when Jai falls in love with Kimi, while on his way to Sunita's village.
\u090f\u0915 \u092a\u0941\u0932\u093f\u0: Samar, a police inspector, gets transferred because of his honesty. A corrupt politician gets angry at him, which puts his and his family's lives in danger.
\u0917\u0940\u0924\u093e \u0917\u0930\u0: Geeta becomes pregnant but due to an incident she loses her child. When she finds a small child, she adopts him, but the child's family accuses her of kidnapping.
\u090f\u0915 \u0915\u093e\u0930 \u0926\u: A passing man, Prakash, is killed in a car accident and Sonam brings his dead body home. With the help of her lover, she disposes of his body but many problems arise.
\u0930\u093e\u091c\u093e \u092c\u0939\u0: Raja Bahadur gets involved in various illegal activities and his brother, Suraj always saves him. Suraj finds himself in a dilemma when Bahadur decides to marry Rekha, whom he loves.
\u0938\u0940\u0924\u093e \u0915\u0947 \u: Sita's sleep walking disorder causes worry for her husband and family. When they investigate, they discover that his behavior is linked to his past life.
\u0906\u0928\u0902\u0926, \u0909\u0928\u: Anand, his wife and daughter, Neha lead a happy life. Neha meets Nandita and a close relationship starts forming between them. Things take a turn when it is revealed that she is actually Neha's biological mother.
\u0930\u093e\u091c\u0947\u0936 \u0915\u0: Rajesh never opposed the changes of British rule but does so after his brother's death. He also leaves his girlfriend Kamini and goes away, which affects their relationship.
\u0921\u0949\u0970 \u0936\u0930\u094d\u0: Dr. Sharma hires Aarti, a young qualified nurse, for his clinic in rural India after posting an advertisement in the newspaper. He soon falls in love with the nurse but is unaware of her past.
\u090f\u0915 \u0930\u093f\u0936\u094d\u0: A Relationship: The Bond of Love
\u090f\u0915 \u0935\u094d\u092f\u093e\u0: Vijay, a businessman, throws his son Ajay out of the house because of his different ideologies. However, when Ajay comes to know about his brother-in-law's evil intentions, he decides to help his family.
\u092e\u0927\u0941\u092e\u093f\u0924\u09: Madhumita and Vishwanathan love each other but Vishwanathan's father disapproves of the relationship as he wants his twin sons to marry twin girls.
\u0939\u094b\u0932\u0940, \u0930\u0902\u: A perfect mix of music to celebrate Holi, the festival of colours. This is the most fun and boisterous Hindu festival, which celebrates love and the month of spring.

\u092a\u094d\u0930\u0947\u092e\u0940, \u: The lovers, Payal and Chetan run away because their parents do not approve of their relationship. They start a new life working for Geeta, but they are unaware of Geeta's true intentions.
Pinky, the granddaughter of a wealthy in: Pinky, the granddaughter of a wealthy industrialist, runs away and marries a taxi driver. However, the businessman holds Pinky's lover responsible and gets him arrested.
\u0930\u093e\u091c\u0915\u0941\u092e\u09: Prince Pratap Singh asks the ambitious Raju to disguise himself as a prince in front of Princess Poonam. Rajkumari falls in love with Raju but he is unaware of her poor background.
\u090f\u0915 \u092f\u0941\u0935\u0915 \u: A young man falls in love with a woman from a red light area, but their love faces opposition and danger from powerful people.
\u091f\u093f\u092f\u093e \u0938\u0947 \u: Jai, a rich businessman who is in love with Tia, accidentally kills her husband in a car accident. Tia loses her memory after the accident and falls in love with Jai, who struggles with guilt.
\u0905\u0928\u0941\u0930\u093e\u0927\u09: After the death of Anuradha's mother, her father remarries a young woman, Anita. Anita dislikes Anuradha and tries to get her addicted to alcohol to throw her out of the house.
\u092d\u093e\u0908 \u092c\u0939\u0928, \: Brother and sister decide to share a pair of shoes until their father buys a new shoe. But things change when his father, unable to find a job, is suspected of being a criminal.
Arjun Pratap Singh, an IPS officer, stri: Arjun Pratap Singh, an IPS officer, strives to overcome multiple challenges and embarks on a mission to restore peace in society.
\u0930\u093e\u091c\u093e \u0915\u094b \u: Raja falls in love but must face his doppelganger, Rocky, to win over his girlfriend's father. Difficulties arise when the king becomes Rocky and Rocky becomes the king.
\u0936\u093e\u0926\u0940 \u0915\u0947 \u: After marriage, an uneducated man named Phullu realizes the problems women face during menstruation. After this, he decides to spread awareness about this issue.

\u092a\u094d\u0930\u093f\u092f\u093e \u0: Priya's brother E. Vijay learns that his lover Raja's father has murdered two women. Is the king also guilty of this murder?
\u090f\u0915 \u0938\u0902\u0917\u0940\u0: AJ, a musician, falls in love with Ruhi. However, before she can reciprocate his love, Reggie, an aspiring singer, expresses his love for Ruhi.
\u092e\u0902\u0917\u0932\u093e \u0915\u0: Mangala is heartbroken when Anup leaves her and she marries blind Anand. She is in love with Anand but when Anand finds out that she is still meeting Anoop, he throws her out of the house.
\u090f\u0915 \u091f\u0948\u0915\u094d\u0: Raja, a taxi driver, falls in love with a rich girl, Aarti. They get married against the wishes of Aarti's parents. But Aarti's parents soon create a rift between them.
\u0935\u0940\u090f\u0938\u0940 \u0915\u0: Shiva, a new student at VAC College, has to stand up against the student union president and a group of hooligans who have made the college environment violent.
\u0905\u0928\u0941\u0930\u093e\u0927\u09: Anuradha Sehgal is forced into politics when her husband, Vivek, goes to jail. As a result, his simple life now becomes a struggle.
\u091b\u094b\u091f\u0947 \u092d\u093e\u0: Two brothers struggle to keep their family together as outside forces, like the younger brother's father-in-law, try to tear them apart.
\u090f\u0915 \u0928\u093f\u0937\u094d\u0: A fired police officer, a dacoit and a police commissioner's son are trapped in a false case by a smuggler. After this, all three together plan to punish him and prove themselves innocent.
\u090f\u0915 \u0932\u0921\u093c\u0915\u0: A girl becomes pregnant, but the child's father refuses to accept her. His family does not support him and his only hope is his good friend who helps him fight against all odds.

\u092a\u094d\u0930\u092d\u093e\u0935\u09: Raj Kumar, an influential industrialist, gives up his first love, Shanti, to marry a rich heiress. Later, Raj and Shanthi's illegitimate son, Vijay attempts to avenge his mother.
\u0938\u0924\u092a\u093e\u0932 \u092f\u0: After Satpal learns the prophecy that his eldest nephew will kill him, he separates his sister's twin sons. However, despite growing up separately, Dharam and Veer become best friends.
\u090f\u0915 \u0935\u093f\u0927\u0941\u0: Umakant Verma, a widower, leads a prosperous life with his only son, Dr. Shashikant. Dr. Shashikant and Gauri marry and have children, but misunderstandings separate them.
\u092e\u0902\u0917\u0932 \u0938\u093f\u0: Mangal Singh escapes from jail and starts a new life and unknowingly befriends his victim's family. He tries to reform himself but has to face his past misdeeds.
\u090f\u0915 \u0932\u094b\u0915\u092a\u0: Subir, a popular singer, encourages his wife Uma to sing. But, marital discord occurs when Uma achieves even greater success in singing.
\u0938\u094b\u092e \u0915\u094b \u0917\u: When Som is selected for a singing reality show, his mother and an older singer try to help him live out his dream. But when Soma is defeated and returns home, he goes into despair.
\u0905\u0936\u094b\u0915 \u092c\u0949\u0: Ashok lives in Bombay and talks sweetly to deceive someone. He pretends to be rich and even lies to his mother but everything changes when she falls in love.
\u0924\u0940\u0928 \u092d\u093e\u0907\u0: Three brothers are raised in different religious families and reunite after many years. They decide to take revenge on those who separated them.
\u092c\u091a\u092a\u0928 \u0938\u0947 \u: Twin brothers, Amit and Inspector Kishan, separated since childhood, meet and share a deep bond. Trouble arises when Satya's criminal father, unbeknownst to him, assigns Amit the task of killing Kishan.

\u090f\u0915 \u091a\u094b\u0930, \u0930\: Ranjit, a thief, assigns his look-alike, Bhola, to take his place when he commits a robbery. However, Bhola soon gets entangled in the world of crime and must prove his innocence.
Set in 1856 this satirical film traces t: Set in 1856 this satirical film traces the fate of Awadh a kingdom ruled by Wajid Ali Shah and his team of disinterested governors. Two noblemen go a step further and devote themselves to endless rounds of chess while their kingdom gets annexed.
\u0905\u0939\u0902\u0915\u093e\u0930 \u0: After losing his job due to ego, Atmaram is dependent on the income of his two sons. He realizes his foolishness when he is left alone and decides to atone for his mistakes.
A casino owner is trapped by a gangster: A casino owner is trapped by a gangster and forced to work for him. However, when he refuses to kill a commissioner, the gangster abducts his secretary and sister to blackmail him.
\u091c\u0939\u093e\u091c \u0915\u0947 \u: Aditya, after being shipwrecked, gets lost on an island. He finds that there, he is haunted by a giant from the other residents, who consider him their protector against a giant.
\u090f\u0915 \u091c\u0947\u0932 \u092e\u: While shooting a documentary in a prison, Chandrika comes across three unique stories and, amidst these stories, she finds what she was looking for.
\u0926\u0940\u092a\u093e \u0905\u092a\u0: Deepa is in love with her college friend, Sanjay, and is about to marry him. However, she coincidentally meets her ex-boyfriend, Naveen and is then caught in a dilemma of choosing between the two.
\u0926\u0941\u0930\u094d\u0917\u093e \u0: Durga gets married in a family where her mother-in-law dominates everyone. This old woman is a greedy person but Durga wants to win her heart by teaching her a lesson in humility.
\u090f\u0915 \u0915\u0935\u092f\u093f\u0: A poetess falls in love with a criminal who is also a poet. After her release he gets separated from her and gets trapped in a web of deceit.

When a young man sets out to look for hi: When a young man sets out to look for his stolen bicycle, he finds himself entwined in a dangerous world of drugs and crime.
\u0905\u092a\u0928\u0947 \u092c\u091a\u0: Kamala, an elderly widow abused by her children, meets a widower named Amrit, who is also abused by his children. After they form a bond, both share each other's pain.
\u0907\u0902\u0926\u0930 \u0914\u0930 \u: Indra and Rama love each other, but unfortunately Indra marries another girl. However, after a few years, Inder and Rama meet again at an unexpected turn of life.
\u0915\u094d\u092f\u093e \u092f\u0939\u0: Is this what you call love
\u092c\u0947\u0939\u0926 \u0906\u0915\u0: An extremely aggressive and abusive police officer arrests Sandhya's father, Rahul, who is in love with Sandhya unrequitedly. His brother gets him bail but Rahul, for repeating the same, pays a heavy price.
\u090f\u0915 \u0915\u0935\u093f \u090f\u: A poet falls in love with a girl and discovers that she is seriously ill. Even after knowing her circumstances, he decides to keep her happy by marrying her.
\u092a\u094d\u0930\u092d\u093e, \u0905\u: Prabha marries debaucher Rajendra and he molests the maid's daughter. Her mother Amba testifies against her and she is sentenced to death but Prabha decides to take revenge from Amba.
\u0932\u0916\u0928 \u0938\u093f\u0902\u0: Lakhan Singh falls in love with Champa and marries her and gives up the life of crime. However, things change when she falls ill and is forced to become a criminal again.
\u0930\u093e\u091c \u090f\u0915 \u0926\u: Raj saves Pooja in an accident, but she goes into a coma. She recovers and falls in love with Raj, however, by then Raj has fallen in love with Pooja's best friend Jhanvi.

\u090f\u0915 \u091a\u094c\u0915\u0940\u0: A watchman, Ramnath fights against all the illegal activities in the neighborhood while stopping his corrupt bosses. During this, he is killed. Many years later, his sons decide to take revenge on their father's murderers.
\u090f\u0915 \u0906\u0926\u092e\u0940 \u: A man leads a double life as a magician and a thief, whose aim is to help the needy and poor. He falls in love with a girl, but later realizes that she is not as she seems.
\u090f\u0915 \u092a\u0941\u0932\u093f\u0: Rajesh, a superintendent of police, meets his old friend, Shekhar, in Goa. But, he has no idea that Shekhar is a smuggler and is involved in illegal activities.
\u090f\u0915 \u092a\u094d\u0930\u0938\u0: The daughter of a renowned heart surgeon is kidnapped and a ransom is demanded. He arranges the money and gives it to the kidnappers, but they disappear with the money without returning his daughter.
\u0938\u093e\u0935\u093f\u0924\u094d\u09: A policeman dies while trying to save Savitri and her twins from a gangster. She raises a son of a policeman, and one of her sons is raised by a lawyer and the other by a kidnapper.

\u0926\u094b \u092f\u0941\u0935\u093e \u: Two young friends live harmoniously, until one's sister is murdered.
\u090f\u0915 \u0908\u092e\u093e\u0928\u0: Vishwanath, an honest lawyer, is framed by a gangster and sent to jail. After his release, he decides to take revenge and eventually becomes a criminal.

\u0915\u0948\u0932\u093e\u0936 \u0915\u0: Kailash's uncle discovers a principle of energy saving that can make him very rich. When Jeevan learns that Kailash is in love with his fiancée, Asha, he plans to get them married.
\u0909\u0924\u094d\u0924\u0930\u0940 \u0: In the northern Indian city of Nainital, police search for a serial killer who targets beautiful women. Neha, who has recently arrived there, helps the police in this case.
\u0930\u0941\u0916\u093c\u0938\u093e\u09: Rukhsar, unable to become a mother, asks her friend, Nagma, to marry her husband, Aslam, and give birth to a child. However, Nagma's relatives create a rift between them.
\u092f\u0936, \u0924\u093e\u091c \u0914\: Yash, Taj and Gaurav are deeply in love with Isha, a beautiful and attractive girl. Isha befriends all three of them but is unaware of their personal intentions.
\u0926\u093f\u0932 \u091c\u094b \u0928\u: the heart that couldn't say no
\u092c\u091a\u092a\u0928 \u0915\u0947 \u: Two childhood friends, unaware of their feelings for each other. They take different paths to fulfill their dreams and upon returning home years later, they discover love for each other.
\u090f\u0915 \u092a\u093e\u0930\u093f\u0: A family man's life changes when he discovers he has an illegitimate son. The child's mother, while dying, sends him to live with his father.

\u0939\u093e\u0932\u093e\u0924 \u0915\u0: Due to circumstances, two young men have to marry girls who are greedy for property.

\u0930\u093e\u091c\u0942 \u0914\u0930 \u: Raju and Urmila meet in New Zealand and fall in love. On a trip to India, Raju pretends to be a pregnant girl's husband to help her confront her family.
\u0935\u0940\u0930\u0942 \u0914\u0930 \u: Veeru and Dhiru live under the tyrannical ruler, Raja Jaichand. Later, they set out on a mission and face challenges to defeat the dictator.

\u0926\u094b \u091c\u0941\u095c\u0935\u0: Raja and Prem Malhotra, twin brothers, are separated at birth and after reuniting, they set out to defeat Ratanlal, a local gangster who wants to destroy the Malhotra family.
\u0905\u091c\u092f \u0914\u0930 \u091c\u: Ajay and Jiya are about to get married. However, their lives take an unexpected turn when Ajay is arrested for his involvement in the robbery of an expensive necklace.
\u090f\u0915 \u091b\u094b\u091f\u093e \u: Aslam, a small business owner, coincidentally meets the Prime Minister of India, who grants him special protection upon his request. Then he dreams of entering politics.
\u090f\u0915 \u092e\u0927\u094d\u092f\u0: A middle-class Muslim falls in love with a Hindu girl, Mehru. After Mehru's death, he is arrested by the police and due to a misunderstanding they mistake him for a terrorist.

\u0907\u0902\u0926\u0930 \u0914\u0930 \u: Inder and Pallavi fall in love with each other in college, but Pallavi's three brothers hate Inder. They run away from home, but decide to return after realizing their parents' love.

\u0932\u094b\u0915\u092a\u094d\u0930\u09: Neha, a popular singer, is poisoned by her former manager which damages her vocal cords. She relocates to a village where she meets Rajesh who decides to help her.

\u0905\u092a\u0928\u0940 \u091c\u0940\u0: In order to improve their lifestyle, three people accidentally enter the world of crime and discover that it is not a bad business.

\u0930\u093e\u091c\u0915\u0941\u092e\u09: When the prince's mother learns that he plans to marry the princess of a rival kingdom, she begins to oppose his marriage.
\u090f\u0915 \u0927\u0930\u094d\u092e\u0: A devout Muslim, Hasmat is asked to repair the car in which Mahatma Gandhi's ashes are kept. However, the situation quickly becomes complicated when violence erupts in the community.
\u0938\u0941\u0902\u0926\u0930\u0932\u09: Sunderlal and Farooq become friends with each other despite many problems. Their troubles escalate further when they meet an old Parsi man, Pestonji.
\u0905\u092e\u0930 \u0914\u0930 \u092e\u: Amar and Mansi's marital life becomes strained when his job at an advertising agency brings him closer to beautiful models.
\u092c\u0932\u0930\u093e\u091c, \u0921\u: Balraj, grandson of don Baba Thakur, takes care of the orphan Nihal and his daughter, Komal. He hires a street fighter to protect Komal, but does not know that Nihaal and Raj are enemies.
\u0924\u0940\u0928 \u092d\u093e\u0908 \u: Three brothers support each other when their father remarries after their mother's death. However, circumstances break their bond and the family is separated.
\u090f\u0915 \u0927\u093e\u0930\u094d\u0: Dinanath, a devout Hindu, wants his son Shankar to marry Salma, who lives in his house. However, Shankar's childhood sweetheart, Neetu comes back into his life.
\u0915\u0948\u0932\u093e\u0936\u0928\u09: Kailashnath recognizes his son Vijay in an orphanage and brings him home. Years later, a man named Ashok, claims to be Kailashnath's real son.
\u092a\u0924\u094d\u0930\u0915\u093e\u09: Journalist Roma and her boss Jindal release Vishal from jail after he helps Roma. However, after she starts working for Jindal, she discovers that she is being used as a pawn.
Rakesh, a journalist, falls in love with Radha who is accused of murdering a millionaire. Rakesh along with his friends and famous lawyer, DK tries to find the truth and prove Radha innocent.
\u0917\u093e\u0901\u0935 \u0932\u094c\u0: When Ravi returns to the village and learns of the tyranny of the landlord on the local farmers, he decides to contest the Panchayat elections against the tyrant and end his cruel rule.
\u0915\u092c\u0940\u0930, \u0938\u093f\u: Kabir wants Sid to kill the Prime Minister and he kidnaps his wife, Richa. While in captivity, Richa finds a mobile phone and dials a number for help which is Sandy's.
\u090f\u0915 \u0905\u092e\u0940\u0930 \u: A rich young man, Karan, saves a poor young man, Raj from a life-threatening accident, which begins the story of their friendship and good relationship.
\u092c\u091a\u092a\u0928 \u0915\u0947 \u: Childhood friends Kabir and Preet commit a crime while playing, after which Kabir and his mother leave the city. They meet again after 12 years but Preet wants to maintain distance from them.
\u0915\u0949\u0932\u0947\u091c \u0915\u0: College lovers, Amar and Lekha decide to get married and reconcile to make their lives compatible. When things settle down, Lekha learns that she has leukemia.
\u090f\u0915 \u0905\u0932\u094d\u0939\u0: A carefree girl falls in love with a lazy boy from her village. One day, she overhears her grandmother and her father's friend talking about that boy. After that, she stops talking to that guy.
Three men are accused of stealing a crow: Three men are accused of stealing a crown and whilst on the run, they are transported to the 10th century. Amidst several adventures, they must try to bring the crown back to prove their innocence.
\u092a\u0941\u0932\u093f\u0938\u0915\u09: Suraj, a policeman, learns that his friend Yash's father runs an illegal business. Now he has to convince Yash to reform his father in his own way, or else he will have to do something.
A comprehensive compilation of some of t: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular songs featuring Bollywood actress Anushka Sharma is played back-to-back.
\u0938\u093e\u0927\u093e\u0930\u0923 \u0: Rahul, an ordinary engineer, comes to Mathura with his wife and son. While a gangster is attracted to his wife and forces her to marry him, he does everything possible to stop her.
\u0930\u093e\u091c \u090f\u0915 \u0932\u: Raj wants to marry a girl, Rati, but Rati's father, Major Verma, insults Raj after learning about his family background. He decides to join the police force.
\u092c\u093e\u092c\u0942 \u0905\u092a\u0: Babu kills one of his ex-friends and Bhagat blackmails him into pretending to be Kundan, the heir of a rich man Shahji, and loot his property. However, Babu falls in love with Shahji's daughter.
\u0939\u0930\u093f\u092f\u093e\u0923\u09: Haryana social activist Satpal Chauhan works for women empowerment and is also trying to create an alcohol-free society. However, they face difficulties while pursuing the goal.
\u091a\u0902\u092c\u0932 \u092e\u0947\u0: Radhe, who lives in Chambal, respects Kadak Singh, a notorious gangster. However, when Tripathi, a politician working for Kadak Singh, casts an evil eye on Radhe's wife, Radhe decides to fight.
\u0939\u092e \u0939\u0948\u0902 \u0930\u: we are the travelers of love
\u0930\u093e\u0939\u0941\u0932 \u0905\u0: Rahul is raising his evil nephews Sunny, Vicky and niece Munni. When they go to a fair, they meet Vaijanti who has run away from home and, without asking Rahul, lets her stay in his house.
\u092e\u0927\u0941 \u0915\u0947 \u0905\u: Madhu's rich father is proud of his position while Raja's father is a miser. Raja and Madhu get married against their parents' wishes and their parents decide to ruin their marriage.

\u0926\u0947\u0935 \u0914\u0930 \u092a\u: Dev and Priya are engaged, yet they fall in love with each other and decide to meet again after six months to get married. However, something else was written in his destiny.
\u091f\u0948\u0915\u094d\u0938\u0940 \u0: Taxi driver's son Amit and rich businessman's daughter Reema fall in love. However, Reema's father wants to marry her to Mumbai gangster Vicky.
\u0926\u0941\u0937\u094d\u092f\u0902\u09: Dushyant wants to become a singer and Jaya encourages him and helps him achieve his dreams. After Dushyant achieves success, people try to create misunderstanding between Dushyant and Jaya.
\u090f\u0915 \u0908\u092e\u093e\u0928\u0: Inspector Sam Bharucha, an honest police officer, kills a young boy, Lalya, in an encounter and sets out to find his parents.
\u090f\u0915 \u092a\u094d\u0930\u0924\u0: The son of a reputed school teacher, aims to avenge his father's death caused by false rumors and insults.
\u090f\u0915 \u0932\u095c\u0915\u0940 \u: A girl loses her parents and her eyesight in an accident. As he grows up, he is operated on to restore his sight. Upon receiving new eyes, he also receives a curse.
\u091c\u0938\u0935\u0902\u0924 \u0915\u0: Jaswant is arrested and tortured for a crime he did not commit. Seeing the plight of his friend, Jaswant, Kripal joins an extremist group to overthrow the government.
